标题: Niki appreciates top-grade imported oil wax leather with a complete set of custom pure copper hardware, paired with the new version of LOGO leather label. With millimeter-level needle spacing for high-fidelity reproduction, we strive for accurate replication and do not develop without the original version!
Purchase original development! Exclusively customized pure copper antique hardware! No original, no development!
Purchased the original development in April.
No development without the original version. Purchase the original version to restore the millimeter-level needle spacing accurately. We take our work seriously. [smiley face]
Purchase the original version and continue development. 😚
Finally shipped the development boards purchased in March for 23,500! You can now place your orders! 😚😚😚
No original, no development!

ICARE small size original version has been purchased and the mold has been opened for production. Appreciate the perfect integration of genuine and imported leather with the original version. Each production cycle requires a long time as we aim for the best quality. We never compromise on quality and put our heart and soul into developing to create better art pieces. Stay tuned for the new release, and pre-orders are accepted.

Millimeter-level replica of Yves Saint Laurent's masterpiece. Official website with traceable invoices for authenticity. Delve into the soul of the LE5A7 wooden bead handbag. Each new design is a new challenge, with every bead made from the same material as the original. Carefully selected materials for the beads to ensure a diameter deviation of ≤0.1mm. Quality craftsmanship akin to a piece of art.
Jamie lucky bag authentic 🆚 imported leather, with a high level of oiliness that domestic leather cannot achieve. Original imported sheepskin, impeccable details 💯.
Developing genuine products may be time-consuming and labor-intensive, but the end result is like a perfect piece of artwork!
Store photos 📷 "Left genuine 𝐕𝐒 large stock custom-made antique hardware, ➕ original factory leather, good texture can be seen at a glance."
